# UZH Flightmare RPG Gate

`rpg_gate.blend` and the original texture are sourced from the MIT-licensed
[`uzh-rpg/flightmare_unity`](https://github.com/uzh-rpg/flightmare_unity/tree/main/Assets/Flightmare/Templates/RPGGate)
repository. It is the gate shipped with Flightmare, the quadrotor simulator from
the University of Zurich Robotics and Perception Group.

The renderer instances the original aluminum truss and front/back printed gate
covers, then scales its 2.438 m opening to the environment's 1.0 m opening.
`RPGGate.png` is an unbranded derivative with the UZH and RPG lab marks removed;
`RPGGate-original.png` preserves the attributed upstream texture.
